nasb.text: and my message and my preaching were not in persuasive words of wisdom, but in demonstration of the Spirit and of power,

esv.text: and my speech and my message were not in plausible words of wisdom, but in demonstration of the Spirit and of power,

cnv.text: 我說的話、講的道，都不是用智慧的話去說服人，而是用聖靈和能力來證明，

ccb.text: 我说话、讲道不是靠充满智慧的雄辩之词，而是靠圣灵的能力作明证，

csbs.text: 我说话、我传道，不是藉着有智慧的说服性的话语，而是藉着圣灵和大能的明证，
